name: Waterdeep
description: Any champion can use wizard spells when defending Waterdeep.

name: Menzoberranzan
description: Can be played at any time. Immune to flyers.

name: Zhentil Keep
description: Zhentil Keep can defend itself as a level 5 cleric.

name: Shadowdale
description: Any champion can cast cleric and wizard spells when defending Shadowdale.

name: Moonshae Isles
description: The Moonshaes can defend themselves as a level 2 hero. All defending allies gain 3 levels.

name: Thay
description: Any champion can use wizard spells when defending Thay.

name: Pirate Isles
description: Flyers cannot attack this realm.

name: Ravens Bluff
description: Any champion can use wizard spells when defending Ravens Bluff.

name: The Great Rift
description: Flyers cannot attack this realm.

name: Myth Drannor
description: Any champion can use wizard spells when defending Myth Drannor. Increases player's maximum hand by one.

name: Jungles of Chult
description: Chult can defend itself as a level 5 monster.

name: Sword Coast
description: The defending player can return one ally to his hand after each round of battle.

name: Anauroch
description: All attackers lose one level.

name: Impiltur
description: All champions and allies who defend Impiltur gain 1 level.

name: Icewind Dale
description: The attacking champion must discard one magical item chosen by the defender.

name: The High Moor
description: Any defending monster gains 4 levels.

name: Damara
description: Double the level of a defending Forgotten Realms champion.

name: Dragonspear Castle
description: All allies of a defending monster gain 2 levels.

name: Daggerdale
description: Allies cannot be used when attacking this realm.

name: Darkhold
description: All defenders of Darkhold gain 2 levels if Zhentil Keep is in play anywhere.

name: Haunted Hall of Eveningstar
description: Draw one card and place it in your hand when this realm is played or rebuilt.

name: Evermeet
description: Any champion can use wiizard spells when defending Evermeet. Flyers cannot attack.

name: Berdusk
description: A wizard or cleric gains 3 levels when defending the attached realm.

name: Tantras
description: No spells can be cast when attacking or defending Tantras.

name: Mulmaster
description: Draw another card every time a spell card is played.

name: Hillsfar
description: Any champion gains 3 levels when defending the attached realm.

name: Suzail
description: Any champion can cast wizard spells when defending the attached realm. If attached to Cormyr, all defenders also gain 4 levels.

name: Arabel
description: The attached realm can defend itself as a level 4 monster.

name: Fortifications
description: Each defender of the attached realm gains 2 levels.

name: Fortifications
description: Each defender of the attached realm gains 3 levels.

name: Selune
description: Undead cannot attack the attached realm.

name: Peasant Militia
description: Each champion and ally attacking the attached realm loses 1 level.

name: Alias the Sell-Sword
description: Immune to offensive spells.

name: King Azoun IV
description: All allies of King Azoun IV gain 1 level.

name: Maligor the Red
description: Once per battle Maligor can shift one opposing ally to his own side.

name: Elminster the Mage
description: Immune to offensive spells.

name: Drizzt Do' Urden
description: When defending, Drizzt must be defeated twice in one battle before he is discarded.

name: Midnight, Goddess of Magic
description: If only one Midnight is in play, wizards cannot cast spells without her permission. She also destroys all magical items held by the opposing champion.

name: Torg Mac Cei, the Ironlord
description: Torg's level is doubled when defending or attacking the Great Rift.

name: The Pereghost
description: All the pereghost's allies gain 2 levels.

name: Bruenor Battlehammer
description: Bruenor gains 2 levels when fighting a monster.

name: Marco Volo
description: At the start of the player's turn, he can look at the top card of any draw pile and discard it if he wants.

name: The Harpers
description: The Harpers can cast wizard and cleric spells, but the player must choose one type (wizard or cleric) in each battle when this card is used.

name: Adventurers!
description: Can use cleric and wizard spells.

name: Crime Lord
description: The Crime Lord can also be played as an event to destroy one holding. The destroyed holding and the Crime Lord are discarded.

name: Adventurers
description: All allies of these adventurers gain 1 level.

name: The Jotunslayers
description: The Jotunslayers are level 8 if the opposing champion is a monster.

name: Myrmidons
description: When the myrmidons are discarded, the player shuffles all discards back into the draw deck.

name: Pteranadon
description: The Pteranadon gains 3 levels when defending Chult.

name: Gorgosaurus
description: The Gorgosaurus gains 3 levels when defending Chult.

name: Greater Feyr
description: The first enemy ally played against the feyr in each battle is discarded immediately.

name: Cleric of Mask
description: This card and attached magical items and artifact are kept face down, and revealed only in battle.

name: Drow Matron
description: The drow matron gains 3 levels when defending Menzoberranzan.

name: Dracolich
description: Can use wizard spells. Undead. Flyer.

name: Vasos Flameslayer
description: Vasos gains 3 levels when fighting monsters.

name: Allisa of the Mist
description: Allisa gains 3 levels when fighting monsters.

name: Worden Ironfist
description: Worden gains 3 levels when fighting monsters.

name: Amarill
description: If Amarill is defeated, the player can pull one other champion from his discards and return it to his hand.

name: Joliet the Rash
description: Once in play, must attack on the player's turn, every turn, or be discarded.

name: Dwarf of Earthfast
description: Gains 4 levels if the opposing champion is a monster.

name: The Black Courser
description: The Black Courser's level is 8 when fighting dragons or undead.

name: Mind Flayer
description: When played, the mind flayer can immediately shift one opposing ally to its own side for that round of battle. The ally loses 1 level.

name: Noble Djinni
description: The opponent cannot play flyers this round and all opposing flyers already in the battle are discarded.

name: Hubadai
description: Flyer.

name: Intellect Devourer
description: Immediately destroys an opposing champion of level 5 or less. Count only magical item and artifact bonuses when determining level.

name: Shandrill
description: Immune to offensive spells.

name: Triceratops
description: Triceratops gains 6 levels when defending Chult.

name: Cleric of Malar
description: This cleric gains 2 levels when attacking realms from outside the Forgotten Realms.

name: Airship
description: Destroys any two allies, chosen by this card's player.

name: Bad Omens
description: All allies and champions lose one level until the player's next turn.

name: Fortunate Omens
description: All allies gain 3 levels until the player's next turn.

name: Rod of Shapechange
description: Select any champion from the discard pile and use it in battle in place of this champion. After winning the battle, this champion and artifact return to the pool; the substitute is discarded.

name: Dwarven Hammer
description: (Off)

name: Staff of Striking
description: The bonus becomes +5 levels if attached to a cleric. (Off)

name: Horrors of the Abyss
description: (Off/4)

name: Flameblade
description: (Off)

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power
description: (Off)

name: Cataclysm!
description: Destroys one realm of the player's choice; that realm is discarded.

name: Good Fortune
description: The player of this card draws five cards immediately.

name: Surprise Raid
description: This player's champion and allies are doubled in levels for one round of battle.

name: Banner of the One-Eyed God
description: All of this champion's allies gain 1 level. (Def)

name: Viperhand
description: Any champion with the Viperhand can cast wizard spells. (Def)

name: Orb of Doom
description: (Off)

name: Staff of Conjuring
description: (Off)

name: Spell of Formless Horror
description: Cast on opposing champion to reduce its level by 3. Spell remains until dispelled. (Off/4)

name: Safe Harbor!
description: Every player can immediately rebuild one razed realm.

name: Labor of Legend
description: One razed realm is rebuilt by a champion from the player's pool; the champion is discarded.

name: Wand of Light
description: (Off)

name: The Free City of Greyhawk
description: Any champion defending Greyhawk can cast cleric and wizard spells.

name: The Lands of Iuz
description: Any champion defending the Lands of Iuz can cast wizard spells. All defenders gain 3 levels if anyone has Iuz in play.

name: The Pomarj
description: A monster defending the Pomarj gains 3 levels.

name: Hold of the Sea Princes
description: This realm can defend itself as a level 1 champion.

name: Blackmoor
description: All magical items and artifacts defending Blackmoor gain 2 levels.

name: Sterich
description: Any monster defending Sterich gains 5 levels.

name: Veluna
description: Any champion defending Veluna can use cleric spells.

name: The Great Kingdom
description: No undead can attack the Great Kingdom. The player's maximum hand increases by two.

name: Temple of Elemental Evil
description: Draw three cards immediately when the temple is played.

name: Greyhawk Ruins
description: All Greyhawk champions of this player gain 2 levels.

name: The Bright Desert
description: Cannot be attacked by heroes.

name: The Bone March
description: Heroes cannot be played in defense of this realm.

name: The Sea Barons
description: Any holding attached to the Great Kingdom also applies to this realm.

name: Bissel
description: Any champion can use cleric spells while defending Bissel.

name: The Scarlet Brotherhood
description: Player can eliminate one champion from any pool at the start of his turn. This realm is then razed.

name: Irongate
description: Any defending hero gains 4 levels.

name: Burneal Forest
description: Any champion and allies who attack Burneal Forest lose 2 levels.

name: Castle Hart
description: Any champion and allies defending Castle Hart gain 2 levels.

name: Arms of the Horned Society
description: The attached realm can defend itself as a level 5 hero.

name: Arms of Iuz
description: Any champion defending the attached realm can cast cleric spells.

name: Arms of Greyhawk
description: No Greyhawk realms with holdings, of any player, can be attacked by monsters or flyers.

name: Arms of the Great Kingdom
description: All undead allies of this player are doubled in level, whether attacking or defending.

name: Arms of Furyondy
description: The attached realm is unaffected by all harmful event cards.

name: Arms of Nyrond
description: Monsters cannot attack the attached realm.

name: Skull Keep
description: Any champion defending the attached realm gains 4 levels.

name: Fortification
description: The attached realm and all its defenders are immune to offensive wizard and cleric spells.

name: Siege!
description: Razes the first realm of every player, regardless of special powers; if a player's first realm is already razed, he ignores this event.

name: War Banner
description: Every champion and ally of this player gains 1 level. (Def)

name: Codex of the Infinite Planes
description: All of this player's champions are immune to offensive magical items and spells. (Def)

name: Crystal of the Ebon Flame
description: The champion who holds this crystal must attack on his turn or be discarded. (Off)

name: Skeletal Horde
description: Undead.

name: Eye and Hand of Vecna
description: The attached champion gains 5 levels when attacking, 2 when defending.

name: Orb of Dragonkind
description: This player's Greyhawk realms and their defenders cannot be attacked by dragons or monsters.

name: Baba Yaga's Hut
description: The attached champion and all its allies are all considered flyers.

name: Chariot of Lyrx
description: The attached champion gains 3 levels and becomes a flyer; all allies can also fly.

name: Cup of Al'Akbar
description: If the player discards three cards from his hand at the end of his turn, he can return any one card from the discard pile to his hand.

name: Rary the Traitor
description: Rary gains 3 levels when fighting a wizard and/or 3 levels when defending a realm with an attached holding.

name: Otto
description: Otto can cast both wizard and cleric spells.

name: Mika the Wolf-Nomad
description: Mika gains 3 levels when the opponent uses allies against him.

name: Lolth, the Spider Queen
description: Lolth can cast both wizard and cleric spells. If Lolth is defeated, shuffle her back into the draw deck.

name: Iuz the Evil
description: Iuz can cast wizard spells. If defeated, Iuz forces one razed enemy realm to be discarded, or razes one realm.

name: Mutiny!
description: No battles can be fought until the player's next turn. A battle in progress stops immediately with no victor; allies are discarded.

name: Swordwraith
description: Undead.

name: Sysania
description: Flyer.

name: Kiara
description: Kiara can destroy one magical item being used against her. The affected item is discarded.

name: Hettman Tsurin
description: If Hettman does not attack, at the end of his turn the player can randomly draw one card from another player's hand and discard it.

name: Griffon
description: The attached champion becomes a flyer. (Def)

name: Sea Zombie
description: Undead.

name: Mist Wolf
description: No allies can be played until this player's next turn. Allies in play are discarded immediately.

name: Tyrinon
description: Flyer.

name: Quagmiela the Dragon
description: Flyer.

name: Seragrimm the Just
description: Undead. Seragrimm can only defend, but never attack.

name: Skulk
description: This player can now play allies face down; their value is not revealed until both players pass and the winner is determined.

name: Berserk Fury!
description: All heroes gain 5 levels until the current player's next turn.

name: Wolf Nomads
description: The nomads gain 2 levels if Mika is in the player's pool.

name: Thorvid
description: Thorvid gains 3 levels when fighting monsters, undead, or flyers.

name: Fairy Madness
description: Fairy madness affects one champion (not currently in battle). That champion is turned face down and cannot be used until after its next turn.

name: Young Gold Dragon
description: Flyer. The Dragon can use wizard spells.

name: Arch-Druid
description: If only one arch-druid is in play, clerics cannot cast spells without his permission.

name: Hell Hound
description: All cards friendly to the hell hound are immune to fireball spells.

name: Griffin
description: Flyer.

name: Giant Skeleton
description: Undead. Any magic sword or spear used by the opposing champion must be discarded immediately.

name: Skeleton
description: Undead.

name: Winged Horror
description: Flyer.

name: Treants of the Grandwood
description: The treants and all cards in the player's force are immune to all offensive wizard spells except fireball.

name: Magical Barding
description: (Def)

name: Border Forts
description: Only flyers can attack the attached realm.

name: Ren's Crystal Ball
description: At the beginning of his turn, the owner of Ren's Crystal Ball can inspect the top three cards of any deck and discard one.

name: Falcon Figurine
description: (Off)

name: Transformation!
description: All players must discard their hands immediately and draw five cards.

name: Enslaved!
description: All players must discard one champion from their pool.

name: Siege
description: All players must discard one realm from their front rank. The next realm played must go into the front position.

name: Bribery!
description: Play immediately after champions are selected. The bribed champion returns to the owner's pool and that player must select another champion or lose the battle.

name: Charge!
description: All of this player's champions gain 3 levels until the end of the player's next turn.

name: Magic Sword
description: +5 vs. undead. (Off)

name: Enlarge
description: Champion can attack flyers with an additional +3. (Def/4)

name: Ring of Shooting Stars
description: Hero can 'lend' +1 to a champion in a combat where he is not involved. (Off)

name: Arms of Veluna
description: Resurrect one ally which just participated in successful defense of the realm. Resurrected card returns to hand.

name: Fast Talking!
description: Everyone is convinced all artifacts and magical items in play no longer work. All players discard all magical items and artifacts.

name: Flight
description: Champion and all allies become flyers for this battle. (Def/4)

name: Shapechange
description: (Def/4)

name: Barbarian Raiders!
description: All players must discard one realm, either from their hand or from the table.

name: Treasure Fleet
description: All players draw three cards.

name: Potion of Fire-Breathing
description: Discard after one use. (Off)

name: Arms of the Shield Lands
description: Attach this holding to a razed Greyhawk realm to rebuild it instantly.

name: Net of Entrapment
description: This champion's opponent cannot play allies. (Off)

name: Johydee's Mask
description: The wearer assumes the level or gains the special power (but not both) of any champion in play.

name: Helm of Teleportation
description: One other champion (belonging to the same player) can join this champion as an ally. That champion returns to the pool after this round but cannot be used again this battle. (Def)

name: Rod of Dispel Magic
description: A champion with this rod can cancel one magic spell when attacking or defending.

name: Draj
description: Nonflying attackers lose 2 levels.

name: Raam
description: All defenders of this realm gain 1 level.

name: Urik
description: Allies cannot be played to attack Urik. Urik can defend itself as a level 4 champion.

name: Tyr
description: Owner draws one extra card per turn. Tyr can defend itself as a level 5 hero.

name: Gulg
description: The first ally to attack Gulg itself each battle is destroyed. Gulg can defend itself as a level 7 hero.

name: Nibenay
description: This card is not flipped face down unless Nibenay is razed twice in a row.

name: Balic
description: All attacking allies are halved (round up). Balic can defend itself as a level 4 hero.

name: The Mud Palace
description: The Mud Palace increases hand size by two cards.

name: North Ledopolus
description: One card can be drawn and played immediately in defense of the attached realm.

name: South Ledopolus
description: The attached realm can use any ally as a champion. The ally is still discarded after the battle.

name: Altaruk
description: Any champion defending the attached realm can cast cleric spells.

name: Salt Veiw
description: Monsters cannot attack the attached realm.

name: Ogo
description: Any champion and allies attacking the attached realm lose one level for fear of Ogo's cannibal halflings.

name: Makla
description: Makla adds 1 level to all defenders of the attached realm.

name: Kalidnay
description: Any monster defending the attached realm gains 4 levels.

name: Arkhold
description: Allows owner to draw one extra card per turn.

name: Salt View
description: Defending champion gains 2 levels.

name: Waverly
description: The attached realm cannot be attacked by flyers and spells cannot be used against its defenders.

name: Bodach
description: A champion attacking the attached realm can have only one ally.

name: Giustenal
description: A champion attacking the attached realm cannot play more than three allies per round.

name: Yaramuke
description: Poisoned water destroys one of the attacker's allies as it is played (defender's choice).

name: Lost Oasis
description: The owner can draw one card and play it immediately when the attached realm is attacked.

name: Grak's Pool
description: The oasis acts as a permanent +5 ally to any champion who defends the attached realm.

name: Silver Spring
description: If the attached realm is razed, one other opponent's realm of the defender's choice is razed also.

name: Bitter Well
description: This oasis destroys any flyers that attack the attached realm.

name: Black Waters
description: No were-creature or monsters can attack any realm held by this player.

name: Fort Melidor
description: Allies defending every Dark Sun realm held by this player gain 1 level.

name: Dungeon of Gulg
description: Any champion and allies attacking the attached realm lose 1 level.

name: Ziggurat
description: The level bonus (number in icon) of any wizard spell cast in defense of the attached realm is doubled.

name: Temple
description: The attached realm can cast cleric spells.

name: Mogadisho's Horde
description: If this card is on the losing side of a battle, all holdings of the opponent are discarded.

name: Assassins
description: If this card is on the losing side of the battle, it destroys one champion anywhere in play chosen by the losing player.

name: Rikus
description: Rikus can attack twice; if he wins his first round, he can attack again with new allies.

name: Agis
description: When attacking, can psionically destroy one monster in the defender's pool before battle begins.

name: Anavias
description: When attacking, psionically negates the power of all enemy holdings for the duration of battle.

name: Chividal
description: Chividal can psionically destroy one opposing ally at any point during the round.

name: Wind Dancers
description: All flyers in play are destroyed immediately.

name: Water Hunters
description: All undead in play are destroyed immediately.

name: Silver Hands
description: All champions killed in the last battle are restored to the players' pools. Play only after a battle is completely resolved.

name: Sky Singers
description: Destroys all magical items in play.

name: Cistern Fiend
description: Enemy allies cannot be used against this fiend.

name: Spirit of the land
description: Prevents one Dark Sun realm or holding from being razed or discarded, or restores one razed realm from any world. An attacker gets no spoils of victory and the battle is over.

name: Captain Kazhal
description: Destroys one magical item held by the opposing champion at any time during the battle round.

name: Dlasva
description: Dlasva can psionically destroy one opposing ally during a round of battle.

name: Tithian
description: If Tithian attacks and wins a round of battle, the defending realm is razed immediately.

name: Defiler
description: If the defiler casts one or more spells, one friendly realm is razed or one friendly holding is shuffled back into the draw pile.

name: Dragon King
description: Can cast wizard spells.

name: Borys
description: Can cast wizard and cleric spells.

name: Orb of Power
description: Offensive spells and magical items have no affect against the champion with this orb. (Def)

name: Ring of All Seeing
description: Allows the owning player, at the beginning of his turn, to look at one player's hand. (Def)

name: Treasure
description: All monsters are bribed to desert; discard all monsters in battle or in pools.

name: Shield of Destruction
description: (Def)

name: Shield of Annihilation
description: (Def)

name: Shield of Devastation
description: (Def)

name: Shield of Wickedness
description: One enemy ally, chosen by the shield's owner, is forced to switch sides and fight for the shield's owner for one round of battle. (Off)

name: Shield of Gore
description: (Off)

name: The Heartwood Spear
description: Kills any opposing dragon or monster in the battle automatically.

name: The Caravan
description: Play only between two player's turns. The player of this event can take a turn immediately. Afterward, play resumes where it left off.

name: The Necklace
description: Allows the attached champion to cast wizard spells.

name: Elemental Cleric
description: The elemental cleric is immune to offensive wizard spells.

name: The Outcast
description: Can use cleric or wizard spells.

name: Desert Warrior
description: The desert warrior's first ally each round is considered a +4, regardless of the ally's actual level.

name: Desert Warrior
description: The desert warrior's first ally each round is considered a +3, regardless of the ally's actual level.

name: Desert Warrior
description: All allies played on the desert warrior gain an additional +1.

name: Tembo
description: The opponent cannot use allies for defense or offense.

name: Fireball
description: Destroys immediately all opposing allies of level 4 or less. (Off/4)

name: Lightning Bolt
description: Immediately destroys one opposing ally of level 4 or less, or one magical item, of caster's choice. (Off/4)

name: Paralyze
description: Cast on a champion before battle to prevent that card from defending. Cast during a battle to eliminate one ally of the caster's choice. (Off/3/4)

name: Magic Missile
description: (Off/4)

name: Wall of Fire
description: Only flyers can attack across the wall. (Off/4)

name: Wall of Iron
description: Only flyers can attack across the wall. Use on defense only. (Def/4)

name: Wall of Stone
description: Only flyers can attack across the wall. Use on defense only. (Def/4)

name: Wall of Force
description: Only flyers can attack across the wall. (Def/4)

name: Invisibility
description: An invisible champion can bypass a defending hero (not a monster, wizard, or cleric) and destroy the realm. The defending hero returns to the pool. (Def/4)

name: Cone of Cold
description: (Off/4)

name: Sleep
description: Eliminates up to three opposing allies of level 1 or 2, chosen by the caster. (Off/4)

name: Shield
description: (Def/4)

name: Fly
description: One champion or ally becomes a flyer. (Def/4)

name: Crushing Fist
description: The crushing fist adds 4 levels or destroys one magical item, at the choice of the caster. (Off/4)

name: Anti-Magic Shell
description: Makes one champion immune to all offensive spells and prevents him from casting any spells himself. (Def/4)

name: Dispel Magic
description: Cancels the effect of any spell. (Def/3/4)

name: Improved Phantasmal Force
description: (Off/4)

name: Fear
description: Attach to any enemy champion in a pool; that card cannot attack or defend until the fear is dispelled. (Off/3)

name: Cure Light Wounds
description: (Def/4)

name: Cure Serious Wounds
description: (Def/4)

name: Sticks to Snakes
description: (Off/4)

name: Blade Barrier
description: Destroys all opposing allies of level 5 or less. Cast only when defending. (Off/4)

name: Bless
description: The champion and each of its allies gain 1 level this round. (Def/4)

name: Sanctuary
description: The cleric who casts sanctuary loses this round of battle but is not discarded; it returns to the pool instead. (Def/4)

name: Wind Walk
description: The champion and all his allies this round are treated as flyers. (Def/4)

name: Bark Skin
description: Adds 2 levels to a single defender. (Def/4)

name: Charm
description: Opponent loses one ally of the caster's choice, chosen immediately. (Off/4)

name: Dispel Magic
description: Cancels the effect of any spell. (Def/3/4)

name: Darkness
description: This battle ends immediately with no victor or loser; champions return to their pools, allies to the players' hands, spells are discarded. Darkness has no effect against monsters. (Def/4)

name: Protection
description: The opponent cannot use undead in this battle round; any already played as allies are discarded. An undead champion loses the battle but returns to the pool. (Def/4)

name: Chariot of Sustarre
description: One champion or two allies can fly for one round of battle. (Def/4)

name: Sunray
description: The sunray kills all undead in one player's pool. (Off/3)

name: Wall of Thorns
description: Cast only when defending. Only attackers of level 3 or higher can cross the wall. (Def/4)

name: Wall of Fire
description: Cast only when defending. Only attackers of level 4 or higher can cross the wall. (Off/4)

name: Holy Word
description: Destroys all undead allies on both sides of a battle instantly. (Off/4)

name: Raise Dead
description: Any one defeated champion can be selected from the player's discard pile and placed back in his hand. (Def/3/5)

name: Flame Strike
description: Destroys any number of opposing allies with levels totaling 6 or less, selected by the caster. Discard immediately. (Off/4)

name: Protection from Lightning
description: Lightning cannot harm the caster or his allies in this battle. (Def/4)

name: Silence
description: The opposing champion cannot cast any spells in this battle. (Off/4)

name: Invisibility to Undead
description: This champion ignores undead opponents.

name: Wall of Fog
description: No attacks are allowed against any player until the caster's next turn. (Off/3)

name: Forget
description: One ally 'forgets' to attack or defend this turn; discard the ally. (Off/4)

name: Web
description: Destroys any opposing allies of level 3 or less already in play. (Off/4)

name: Blink
description: A champion who is about to lose a round of battle escapes to the player's pool, but the battle is still lost. (Def/4)

name: Hold Undead
description: Opposing undead allies have no effect on the outcome of this battle. (Off/4)

name: Charm Monster
description: An opposing monster returns to its pool; the caster wins this round of battle. (Off/4)

name: Wind of Disenchantment
description: An anti-magic storm sweeps across the cosmos, destroying all magical items in play.

name: Black Tentacles
description: All champions of level 4 or less die, regardless of whether they are in battle or in pools. (Off/3/4)

name: Fire Shield
description: (Off/4)

name: Ice Storm
description: Destroys all champions and allies of level 4 or less in play anywhere.

name: Phantasmal Killer
description: The champion gains one level for each ally played against him. (Off/4)

name: Solid Fog
description: Unearthly fog prevents all attacks against all players until this player's next turn.

name: Animate Dead
description: A wizard who casts this spell can fight again in the next round of battle, regardless of whether he won or lost the previous round. (Def/4)

name: Cloudkill
description: Opposing allies of level 3 or less are discarded and no more can be played this round. (Off/4)

name: Feebleminded
description: An opposing spellcaster cannot cast any spells for the rest of this round. (Off/4)

name: Magic Jar
description: If the defender is defeated, the current attacking champion becomes the defending champion in the next round of this battle and then is discarded. (Off/4)

name: Faithful Hound
description: Only flyers can attack any realm until the player's next turn.

name: Passwall
description: Negates any wall spell. (Def/4)

name: Rock to Mud
description: Only flyers can attack this player's realms until the player's next turn. (Def/4)

name: Chain Lightning
description: (Off/4)

name: Death Fog
description: Kills all champions of level 5 or less in one player's pool and prevents survivors from attacking until after that player's next turn. (Off/3)

name: Death Spell
description: Kills any one champion or ally of the caster's choosing of level 7 or less. (Off/3/4)

name: Disintegrate
description: Destroy's one realm, regardless of position. The destroyed realm must be discarded. This player can make no attacks this turn. (Off/3)

name: Geas
description: The affected champion can neither attack nor defend until after the owner's next turn. (Off/3)

name: Banishment
description: Destroys one monster of the caster's choice. (Off/3/4)

name: Control Undead
description: The caster can ask any player for his largest undead ally card and use it in this round of battle. The ally is discarded afterward. (Off/4)

name: Finger of Death
description: Kills any one champion or ally of level 5 or less. (Off/4)

name: Spell Turning
description: Turns a just-cast spell back at its caster, as if the original target had cast it. (Def/3/4)

name: Ancient Curse
description: Choose one champion with an attached artifact or magical item to be killed immediately. Discard the champion and his possessions.

name: Calm
description: This magical calm undoes the harmful effect of an event, but only for the player of this card.

name: Discovery of Spellfire
description: The user can examine all other player's hands and discard one card from each.

name: Magical Champion
description: Attach this item to an ally from your hand. The ally becomes a champion (hero) until discarded for any reason. Its level is unchanged. (Def)

name: Traitor
description: One ally of this player's choice switches sides for the duration of this round.

name: Chaos Shield
description: A champion with this shield gains 1 level for every ally currently opposing him.

name: Slave Realm of Tunek
description: No cleric or wizard can attack this realm.

name: Phorbes's Scrolls
description: Besides adding 7 levels, the scrolls force the largest enemy ally played so far to be discarded. (Off/4)

name: Mercenary Gold
description: One opposing ally of level 1 or 2, chosen by this player, is discarded.

name: Living Scroll
description: The Living Scroll defeats a hero or cleric automatically. But it is automatically defeated by a wizard or monster.

name: Ren's Bell of Death
description: Allies of level 4 or higher cannot be used against the champion who carries Ren's Bell of Death.

name: The Labyrinth Map of Shuuc
description: A champion with this map is never discarded; if defeated, he escapes into the labyrinth and returns to the player's pool at the end of the player's next turn.

name: Annulus
description: At the beginning of its owner's turn, this helm of telepathy (fashioned from a mummified illithid's head) allows the player to examine an opponent's hand.

name: Scroll of 7 Leagues
description: The possessor of this scroll (and allies) can attack any realm without flying. (Def)

name: Map of Life
description: No player can play a realm or rebuild a realm until this player's next turn.

name: Supernatural Chill
description: Unnatural winter strips 2 levels from every champion and ally until this player's next turn. Any card reduced to level 0 is discarded immediately.

name: Map to a Mercenary Army
description: Offensive wizard spells have their levels (if any) halved (rounding up) when used against this ally.

name: Pit Trap!
description: Traps a winning champion so a realm is not razed. The champion is discarded as if he had lost the battle.

name: Mind Flayer Lord
description: The illithid immediately destroys all opposing allies of level 3 or less. The illithid can only be joined by allies of at least level 4.

name: Aurak Draconian Lord
description: If the aurak is defeated, it also forces the champion who killed it to be discarded.

name: Ego Coin
description: A champion with this coin can have any number of attached artifacts, and of any world. (Def)

name: Chest of Many Things
description: The champion with this chest can fly, and can function as a hero, wizard, cleric, or monster; the player chooses which type of champion before each round. (Def)

name: Gelatinous Cube
description: If the opposing champion loses in combat, his attachments are transferred to the cube. It receives all bonuses from the items while under its control. When the cube is defeated, the cards go to their owner's discard pile.

name: Gatekeeper
description: Immune to events and offensive spells. Can be sent to the Abyss to send home all champions (champions return to the player's hand).

name: Age of Entropy
description: Played at the beginning of the player's turn, this card is not discarded. It affects all players and remains in effect until any other rule card is played. At the end of each player's turn (after discarding down to maximum hand size), that player must discard a card from his hand or pool, or raze a realm.

name: Orb of Green Dragonkind
description: Once per turn can duplicate the level and special powers of any dragon in play. The orb cannot be used again until the player's next turn.

name: The Undead Htimsen
description: Undead. Flyer. If played between 6 PM and 6 AM his level rises to 10. Spiritual kin to the Gib Htimsen, this vampire automatically defeats psionicists.

name: Tapestry of the Stag
description: This player's champions are immune to the special powers (but not the levels) of all Ravenloft champions and allies.

name: Dori the Barbarian's Cape
description: Champion cannot be discarded by harmful events, offensive spells, or psionic powers. Once per turn, he can cancel one helpful event played. He must attack every turn, if possible, or be discarded.

name: Weasel Attack!
description: When attacking, this player can choose an opponent's champion to take his champion's place in combat. That player must fight with his own cards. If he wins, the realm is automatically razed; both he and the event player draw spoils. If he loses, his champion is discarded and his foremost realm is razed; the event player draws spoils. (Harmful)

name: The Barbarian's Decree
description: Played at the beginning of the player's turn, this card is not discarded. It affects all players and remains in effect until any other rule card is played. The glory of combat demands that all players attack each turn (if possible). Any who do not must discard down to 5 cards at the end of their turn. Those who do attack are rewarded by the gods: Their champions may attack twice each round unless defeated in combat or the realm is razed.

name: The Abyssal Vortex
description: Played at the beginning of the player's turn, this card is not discarded. It affects all players and remains in effect until any other rule card is played. Wish and Limited Wish spells cannot be cast. All spells and allies played while this card is in effect are discarded into the Abyss.

name: Prismal the Outrageous
description: Can cast wizard and cleric spells and is immune to offensive magical items. Prismal and his allies can attack any Forgotten Realms realm, regardless of position or powers, and he gains two spoils of victory if he razes it.

name: Malatra, the Living Jungle
description: Malatra can defend itself as a level 6 monster. It cannot be attacked by any champion or ally that is a swimmer. The level of attacking champions and allies that are not flyers is halved.

name: Mayor Charles Oliver O'Kane
description: His allure and charm are beyond compare, and all female heroes, wizards, and clerics who face him in battle return to their pools, defeated. He gains 3 levels when defending a Forgotten Realms realm.

name: Bengoukee the Witch Doctor
description: Can cast wizard and cleric spells and is immune to all spells cast in phase 3. Phase 4 spells cast by the witch doctor are at twice the level bonus.

name: Big Chief Bagoomba
description: Bagoomba is a figurehead of great charisma. When defending, the levels of his allies are doubled, and opposing allies of level 3 or less cannot be played.

name: The Genie Bottle
description: All spells in play are dispelled, including a just-cast spell, and all holdings and rule cards are removed from play. Can be Calmed by individual players but cannot be canceled. (Harmful)

name: Estate Transference
description: This spell places a realm and any attached holding in the Abyss. If spell-turned or reflected, the caster of this spell is placed in the Abyss. This player can make no attacks this turn. Limit one per deck. (Off/3)

name: Starshine
description: Starshine and her allies can attack any realm regardless of its position or powers. If defeated, she can be placed beneath a realm to duplicate the effects of any opposing holding in play.

name: The Starving Artist
description: If on the losing side of a battle, no one gains a spoils of victory, and one opponent (this player's choice) must discard his hand down to two.

name: The King of the Elves
description: Automatically defeats any wizard played against him but is instantly defeated by an undead champion. If defeated in battle, all wizards of base level 7 or higher are discarded from every player's pool.

name: Sakornia
description: Sakornia gains 3 additional levels when using an artifact.

name: Edormira, Red Dragon
description: Flyer. No monster can defend against Edormira.

name: Gloriana
description: Gloriana can cause a gust of wind to blow all flyers out of battle; no flyers can be played against her.

name: Gib Ekim
description: Gib can fight as either a wizard (5) or a hero (7); the player must choose at the start of the round.

name: Neirgral, Green Dragon
description: Flyer. Neirgral is so frightening that no allies of level 4 or less can be played on either side.

name: Dagaronzie, Green Dragon
description: Flyer. Dagaronzie can instantly destroy any two allies played against it in a round of battle.

name: Fejyelsae
description: If any allies are played with Fejuelsae, she drops to level 7.

name: Dragon Rage!
description: All creatures fear the dragon rage! Every player must discard one champion from his hand or pool.

name: Shalbaal, Red Dragon
description: Flyer. Every time Shalbaal wins a round of battle, the player randomly draws one card from the defeated player's hand and discards it. The player must laugh while doing this.

name: Delsenora
description: Delsenora is also an oracle. She can cancel the effect of one event card for this player, but must be discarded afterward.

name: Gib Evets
description: This creature is so magic-resistant that magical items and spells have no effect against it; only artifacts can hurt it.

name: Dori the Barbarian
description: Dori gains 2 levels when fighting a cleric or a wizard.

name: Gib Htimsen
description: The nether monstrosity is immune to all spells, events, magical items, and artifacts.

name: Darbee
description: Darbee gains 4 levels when fighting a monster.

name: Aurum, Gold Dragon
description: Flyer. Aurum gains 1 extra level per friendly ally (in addition to the ally's bonus).

name: Halcyon
description: Every time Halcyon wins a round of battle, the player can return one card from the discard pile to his hand.

name: Stryck
description: When Stryck attacks, she gets to pick her opponent from those champions in the defender's pool.

name: Alicia
description: Alicia's protective spells give her complete immunity against magical items; opponents' magical items have no effect.

name: Red Zeb
description: No allies of level 3 or less can be played against the horrid Zeb.

name: The Avatar
description: The Avatar instantly destroys all undead champions and/or allies.

name: Smolder, Red Dragon
description: Flyer. If Smolder loses a round of battle, he destroys one of his owner's holdings for revenge.

name: Lovely Colleen
description: All monsters are awed by her beauty. Colleen wins the round automatically if the opposing champion is a monster.

name: Ember, the Red Dragon
description: Flyer. If Ember is defeated, the victor can draw two spoils of victory cards (the dragon's hoard).

name: Andra the Wise
description: Andra carries an enchanted staff that prevents any undead allies from being played against her.

name: Karm, Black Dragon
description: Flyer. Karm can cast wizard spells but is excessively proud; no allies can be played to aid him.
